ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.LuaScript:
function onDrop(color)
    if helperGuid == nil or targetLocation == nil or colorIndex == nil then return end
    self.setVectorLines({})
    local helper = getObjectFromGUID(helperGuid)
    helper.call("removeBorder", { location = targetLocation, colorIndex = colorIndex})
    targetLocation = nil
    colorIndex = nil

    -- Charging Beast
    local locations = helper.getVar("LOCATIONS")
    broadcastToAll("If unengaged, move Charging Beast once toward " ..
        locations[math.random(6)].name)
end

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.LuaScript:
function onDrop(color)
    if helperGuid == nil or targetLocation == nil or colorIndex == nil then return end
    self.setVectorLines({})
    local helper = getObjectFromGUID(helperGuid)
    helper.call("removeBorder", { location = targetLocation, colorIndex = colorIndex})
    targetLocation = nil
    colorIndex = nil
end

ContainedObjects.Description: Korean localized parallel scenario campaign cards

Description:
[b]Instructions:[/b]
Put this box into the 'Encounter Cards Box' in the upper left corner.
This will replace the corresponding cards for all purposes!

[b]안내:[/b]
이 상자를 좌측 상단 구석에 있는 'Encounter Cards Box' 에 올려놓아주세요.
해당하는 모든 원어 카드를 한국어로 바꿔줍니다!
Name: Custom_Model_Bag
